hero.title: Frontend Engineer & Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I'm a Software Engineer specializing in front-end development with React/Next.js and TypeScript. I have experience in building scalable and maintainable web applications. Experienced in FinTech and blockchain projects, processing datasets with millions of records simultaneously, and architecting enterprise-scale inventory systems.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio:
I am a software engineer specializing in user interface design and enhancing user experiences. I graduated from HUFLIT in Sep 2022 with a Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering.

Currently, I am a Frontend Engineer with 4 years of experience working with React/Next.js, TypeScript, and other modern technologies. I have extensive experience working in FinTech and blockchain, processing large datasets, and building large-scale inventory management systems. My upcoming goal is to develop myself, learn more about technologies, problem-solving trends, and team management to become a Frontend Tech Lead.

At present, I am focusing on the React/Next.js ecosystem, optimizing performance, and building scalable UI architectures. I enjoy solving complex problems and continuously learning new technologies to provide better solutions.

alchemy.summary: Core developer for enterprise-scale Web3 GameHub platform and internal operational systems.
alchemy.clientDesc: A client-facing platform for transactions, deposits, withdrawals, and gameplay.
alchemy.adminDesc: Administrative back-office equipped with AI bot integration, real-time charts, and role-based management.
alchemy.title: Project: Crypto GameHub Platform
alchemy.c1: Developed multi-threaded, dynamic UI/UX to enhance the user experience for deposit, withdrawal, and gameplay functionalities.
alchemy.c2: Refactored the existing Styled UI to UIKit and utilized shadcn/ui for UI standardization, ensuring a consistent, cohesive design across the platform and improving overall user experience.
alchemy.c3: Built and maintained features that improved SEO to support marketing efforts.
alchemy.c4: Created an immersive, live-feeling web experience through dynamic updates and time-based features.
alchemy.c5: Developed a chat communication system that enabled real-time interaction between users.
alchemy.a1: Refactored the codebase from React 16 to the latest React 18+ with ES6+ standards, and migrated build setup to Vite.js, improving code quality, maintainability, performance optimizations, and build speed.
alchemy.a2: Built a dashboard with charts to track the system's money input/output, enhancing monitoring and reporting capabilities.
alchemy.a3: Managed multi-role user interface elements for the admin web, supporting role-based access control.
alchemy.a4: Utilized socket.io to update token prices in real-time, ensuring token values reflect current market trends and providing accurate financial data.
alchemy.a5: Handled large-scale data, optimizing performance for millions of simultaneous users and ensuring smooth system operations.
alchemy.a6: Integrated Gemini AI chat box for efficient management, including forecasting token limits, voucher payouts, and bot token quotas.
alchemy.a7: Built robust fallback mechanisms for AI bots to handle data processing errors and ensure smooth interactions with users.

aion.summary: Developed high-security banking systems for internal users and customers.
aion.vtmDesc: An automated transaction system for VTM (Video Teller Machine) kiosks.
aion.title: Project: VTM (Video Teller Machine)
aion.desc1: Developed responsive front-end features in the web client, implementing dynamic UI components and interactive user experiences for deposit and withdrawal functionalities.
aion.desc2: Architected role-based authentication on the admin side and designed custom interfaces for each user role, ensuring appropriate access control, minimizing customer data exposure, and enhancing the user experience.
aion.desc3: Integrated SDK Video Call for live customer support directly from the VTM device.
aion.desc4: Optimized large-scale data handling with Pagination and Virtual Scrolling, and supported real-time data visualization with Elastic Search for efficient performance.
aion.desc5: Wrote comprehensive Unit Tests for components and APIs. Integrated Sentry to monitor, log, and effectively debug production issues.

itbee.summary: Developed a full-stack management and marketing platform for Spa/Clinic chains.
itbee.daysakiDesc: The Daysaki system enables comprehensive healthcare service access and management.
itbee.title: Project: Daysaki Spa & Clinic
itbee.desc1: Developed a web application for both client and admin using React.js and Next.js.
itbee.desc2: Implemented client-side features for service browsing, appointment booking, and customer reviews, used Next.js for better supported for SEO.
itbee.desc3: Built the Admin side with React.js and used Redux Toolkit and Redux Thunk to manage admin-side state for appointment management, payment processing, and customer data, and Socket.io real-time order management capabilities.
itbee.desc4: Utilized GraphQL for efficient data fetching and management between the client and server, ensuring optimized and flexible queries.
itbee.desc5: Optimized the website for SEO to improve Google search visibility and traffic.

gamehub.title: Crypto Gamehub Platform
gamehub.description: Centralized Web3 gaming platform integrating cryptocurrency transactions and an LLM-powered Telegram Chatbot (Gemini API) for customer service. Utilized Next.js (App Router) for SEO, handled transaction signing via Wagmi/Ethers.js on Ethereum/BNB Chain, and designed 'Core Soul' architecture to optimize LLM token usage.

vtm.title: VTM Transaction Management
vtm.description: Deposit/withdrawal transaction management system for SacomBank's Video Teller Machines (VTM). Designed highly secure UI, developed WebSocket-enabled Admin Dashboard for minimal latency, and integrated Unit Testing & Sentry logging.

daysaki.title: Daysaki Spa & Clinic
daysaki.description: Process management and promotional platform for a Spa/Clinic chain with SEO optimization. Built Admin Dashboard featuring complex analytical charts and real-time order tracking capabilities.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have an interesting project? Get in touch with me!
